---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.page-hero}
# Skills & Certifications

[A comprehensive view of my technical competencies and credentials.]{.page-subtitle}
:::

::: {.content-area}

---

## Core Skill Areas

::: {.skills-grid}

::: {.skill-category-card}
### 🛡 Food Safety & Operations

::: {.skill-tags}
[HACCP]{.skill-tag}
[Regulatory Compliance]{.skill-tag}
[Risk Management]{.skill-tag}
[Quality Assurance]{.skill-tag}
[FoodSafe Level 2 (BC)]{.skill-tag}
[Product Rotation & Inventory]{.skill-tag}
[Supplier Management]{.skill-tag}
[Temperature Control]{.skill-tag}
[Contamination Prevention]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category-card}
### 🥗 Clinical & Sports Nutrition

::: {.skill-tags}
[Medical Nutrition Therapy]{.skill-tag}
[Anthropometric Assessment]{.skill-tag}
[Bioimpedance Analysis]{.skill-tag}
[Sports Nutrition]{.skill-tag}
[Breastfeeding Education]{.skill-tag}
[NICU Nutrition Support]{.skill-tag}
[Allergen Management]{.skill-tag}
[Meal Planning]{.skill-tag}
[Patient Counselling]{.skill-tag}
[Motivational Interviewing]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category-card}
### 🤖 AI, Business & Leadership

::: {.skill-tags}
[AI Integration Strategy]{.skill-tag}
[Machine Learning Concepts]{.skill-tag}
[Operations Management]{.skill-tag}
[Staff Training & Development]{.skill-tag}
[Performance Metrics]{.skill-tag}
[Sales Data Analysis]{.skill-tag}
[Strategic Planning]{.skill-tag}
[Project Coordination]{.skill-tag}
[LLM-Assisted Workflows]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category-card}
### 📋 Tools & Technologies

::: {.skill-tags}
[Quarto / R Markdown]{.skill-tag}
[Microsoft Office Suite]{.skill-tag}
[Data Reporting & Dashboards]{.skill-tag}
[Dietary Analysis Software]{.skill-tag}
[Visual Studio Code]{.skill-tag}
[HTML / CSS (Basic)]{.skill-tag}
[Prompt Engineering]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

:::

---

## Certifications & Credentials

::: {.cert-card}
::: {.cert-icon}
🛡
:::
::: {}
::: {.cert-title}
FoodSafe Level 2
:::
::: {.cert-org}
BC Centre for Disease Control (BCCDC) — British Columbia, Canada
:::
::: {.cert-year}
Active · Advanced food safety certification for supervisory roles in BC food service
:::
:::
:::

::: {.cert-card}
::: {.cert-icon}
🏋
:::
::: {}
::: {.cert-title}
Functional Sports Nutrition Certificate
:::
::: {.cert-org}
Brazil
:::
::: {.cert-year}
Completed · Evidence-based sports nutrition for recreational and competitive athletes
:::
:::
:::

::: {.cert-card}
::: {.cert-icon}
📊
:::
::: {}
::: {.cert-title}
Industry Management Certificate
:::
::: {.cert-org}
University of São Paulo (USP), Brazil
:::
::: {.cert-year}
Completed · Business fundamentals for professionals transitioning into management roles
:::
:::
:::

::: {.cert-card}
::: {.cert-icon}
🎓
:::
::: {}
::: {.cert-title}
MBA — AI & Machine Learning Leadership *(in progress)*
:::
::: {.cert-org}
University Canada West, Vancouver, BC
:::
::: {.cert-year}
Expected 2026 · Strategy, data analytics, AI applications, and organizational leadership
:::
:::
:::

::: {.cert-card}
::: {.cert-icon}
🥗
:::
::: {}
::: {.cert-title}
Bachelor of Science in Nutrition
:::
::: {.cert-org}
Centro Universitário São Camilo, São Paulo, Brazil
:::
::: {.cert-year}
Graduated · Clinical nutrition, dietetics, public health nutrition, and food science
:::
:::
:::

::: {.cert-card}
::: {.cert-icon}
🔬
:::
::: {}
::: {.cert-title}
Diploma in Food Technology
:::
::: {.cert-org}
UNICAMP — Universidade Estadual de Campinas, Brazil
:::
::: {.cert-year}
Graduated · Food processing, safety systems, and quality assurance
:::
:::
:::

---

## Languages

::: {.lang-grid}

::: {.lang-card}
::: {.lang-name}
🇧🇷 Portuguese
:::
::: {.lang-level}
Native Speaker
:::
::: {.lang-dots}
[●]{.lang-dot .filled}[●]{.lang-dot .filled}[●]{.lang-dot .filled}[●]{.lang-dot .filled}[●]{.lang-dot .filled}
:::
:::

::: {.lang-card}
::: {.lang-name}
🇨🇦 English
:::
::: {.lang-level}
Advanced (C1)
:::
::: {.lang-dots}
[●]{.lang-dot .filled}[●]{.lang-dot .filled}[●]{.lang-dot .filled}[●]{.lang-dot .filled}[●]{.lang-dot style="background:var(--border);"}
:::
:::

::: {.lang-card}
::: {.lang-name}
🇪🇸 Spanish
:::
::: {.lang-level}
Basic (A2)
:::
::: {.lang-dots}
[●]{.lang-dot .filled}[●]{.lang-dot .filled}[●]{.lang-dot style="background:var(--border);"}[●]{.lang-dot style="background:var(--border);"}[●]{.lang-dot style="background:var(--border);"}
:::
:::

:::
---
